calendar.title: AI Offsite Training Session
calendar.context: Hands-on AI session. Individual build time 1:45-2:30pm.

calendar.title: Exec Team Sync — Board Prep
calendar.context: Each exec gives 60-second status on board deck section. Brad wants no surprises before Wednesday deadline.

calendar.title: LATAM Corridor Partnership Review
calendar.context: Review Banco Santander LOI for Brazil-Mexico corridor. Need legal and finance sign-off to countersign. Target: announce at Consensus in May.

calendar.title: GTreasury Integration Check-in
calendar.context: Biweekly integration status. Ripple Custody integration targeting April beta.

emails.subject: LATAM corridor expansion — LOI review
emails.preview: Eric — attached is the signed LOI for the Brazil-Mexico payment corridor partnership. Legal review needed before countersign. Target: Consensus in May.
emails.action: Route to legal, prepare for 5pm review call

emails.subject: Competitive positioning — Visa B2B Connect
emails.preview: Visa announced expanded B2B Connect coverage to 30 new markets. Need competitive response brief for my CNBC appearance Thursday. Coverage comparison + differentiation talking points by Wednesday AM.
emails.action: Coordinate competitive brief — this is in your wheelhouse

emails.subject: FCA post-conditions — compliance officer nomination
emails.preview: FCA compliance officer nomination needs Stu's sign-off by Tuesday. Sarah Park recommended.
emails.action: FYI — Stu's decision, but you're CC'd given market activation implications

emails.subject: Board prep — final materials due Wednesday
emails.preview: All materials due to Monica's team by EOD Wednesday. Flag issues today.
emails.action: Confirm your section (M&A integration + strategic initiatives) is on track

emails.subject: Weekly competitive digest — March 9
emails.preview: Key moves: SWIFT testing tokenized asset settlement with 6 banks. Circle launched USDC on 3 new chains. Stellar partnered with MoneyGram for Africa expansion. JPM Kinexys processing volume up 40% QoQ.
emails.action: Review — Brad's Visa question makes this timely

emails.subject: GTreasury Q1 numbers — preview
emails.preview: ARR at $48.2M (up from $46.5M at acquisition). Net retention 112%. 3 new enterprise logos. Integration with Ripple Custody on track for April beta.

slack.message: Reminder: board materials due Wednesday. No extensions.
slack.relevance: Your section needs to be ready

slack.message: XRPL Batch Transactions amendment passed — goes live March 15. Big for enterprise customers.
slack.relevance: Strategic initiative — include in board section as product milestone

slack.message: ALERT: Visa B2B Connect expanded to 30 new markets (announcement March 9). Coverage now spans 100+ countries. Key new markets: Brazil, India, Nigeria, Indonesia.
slack.relevance: Brad already asked for a response brief — this is the source data

slack.message: Santander LOI is signed and sent. Waiting on our countersign. Legal review is the gate.
Luxembourg CSSF license fully operational + EU passporting activated. Live in 8 EU markets.
slack.relevance: Market activation milestone — add to board section

slack.message: Eric — can you send me the M&A integration summary for my board section? Need it by EOD Tuesday.
